job_summary: A Senior CRA independently manages complex clinical trials, oversees multiple sites, and ensures compliance with protocols and regulations while mentoring junior CRAs.
key_responsibilities: Conduct and lead monitoring visits (SIV, MV, COV)
Perform advanced Source Data Verification (SDV) and risk assessment
Ensure compliance with Good Clinical Practice
Identify and resolve protocol deviations and site issues
Mentor CRA I/II and junior staff
Prepare high-level monitoring and audit reports
qualifications: Bachelor’s/Master’s in Life Sciences / Pharmacy / Nursing
career_path: Senior CRA → Lead CRA → Clinical Trial Manager
skills_required: identify and resolve protocol deviations and site issues
mentor cra i/ii and junior staff
prepare high-level monitoring and audit reports
